## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The tutorial runs end-to-end with the documented commands (e.g. `docker compose up`).
- [ ] Any `config/server.yaml` validates against Drasi Server.
- [ ] New tutorials are listed in `tutorial/README.md` and the root `README.md`.
